ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sensor_networks" (
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor network */,
  "network_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor network */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the sensor network */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the sensor network */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the sensor network */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor network was created */,
  "last_updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor network was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor network (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor network location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor network location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensors" (
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sensor */,
  "network_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the sensor network the sensor belongs to */,
  "sensor_type" TEXT /* Type of sensor (e.g., Temperature, MLR) */,
  "sensor_name" TEXT /* Name of the sensor */,
  "installation_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was installed */,
  "calibration_date" TEXT /* Date the sensor was last calibrated */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the sensor */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the sensor */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the sensor */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the sensor (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_replacement_date" TEXT /* Date when the sensor was last replaced */,
  "battery_life" REAL /* Remaining battery life of the sensor (in days) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sensor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensors_network_id FOREIGN KEY ("network_id") REFERENCES sensor_networks ("network_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sensor_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "sensor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the sensor that collected the data */,
  "time" REAL /* Time at which the data was collected */,
  "mlr_mean" REAL /* Mean mass loss rate (MLR) value */,
  "temp_avg_all4" REAL /* Average temperature across all sensors */,
  "mlr_error" REAL /* Error in the MLR measurement */,
  "temperature_error" REAL /* Error in the temperature measurement */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the sensor when the data was collected */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the sensor when the data was collected */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the sensor when the data was collected */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the external data source used to augment the data (if applicable) */,
  "data_version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sensor_data_sensor_id FOREIGN KEY ("sensor_id") REFERENCES sensors ("sensor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quality metric */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point the metric belongs to */,
  "quality_score" REAL /* Quality score of the data point */,
  "flag" TEXT /* Flag indicating if the data point is valid or invalid */,
  "flag_reason" TEXT /* Reason for the flag (e.g., sensor malfunction, data anomaly) */,
  "quality_check_type" TEXT /* Type of quality check performed (e.g., automated, manual) */,
  "quality_check_description" TEXT /* Description of the quality check process */,
  "quality_check_date" TEXT /* Date when the quality check was performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_processing" (
  "processing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each processing step */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point processed */,
  "processing_step" TEXT /* Name of the processing step */,
  "processing_date" TEXT /* Date the processing step was applied */,
  "processing_description" TEXT /* Description of the processing step */,
  "processing_status" TEXT /* Status of the processing step (e.g., completed, failed) */,
  "processing_duration" REAL /* Duration of the processing step (in seconds) */,
  "processing_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the processing step */,
  "processing_log" TEXT /* Log of the processing step for debugging and auditing purposes */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("processing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_processing_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model result */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data model used */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point used for prediction */,
  "predicted_value" REAL /* Predicted value from the model */,
  "actual_value" REAL /* Actual value from the data point */,
  "error" REAL /* Error between predicted and actual values */,
  "result_status" TEXT /* Status of the model result (e.g., valid, invalid) */,
  "result_date" TEXT /* Date when the model result was generated */,
  "result_description" TEXT /* Description of the model result, including any anomalies or issues detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES data_models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_results_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "reset_token" TEXT /* Token for password reset (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" REAL /* Duration of the access event (in seconds) */,
  "access_ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_access_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data point */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "version_type" TEXT /* Type of the version (e.g., major, minor) */,
  "version_user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the version */,
  "version_status" TEXT /* Status of the version (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES sensor_data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_version_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "source_url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date the data source was last updated */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of the data source (e.g., API, database) */,
  "source_status" TEXT /* Status of the data source (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "source_authentication" TEXT /* Authentication method used to access the data source (e.g., API key, username/password) */,
  "source_last_access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source was last accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)
